# Scène（セヌ）

> 鳥取県大山町の森に佇む、フレンチ・オーベルジュ。山陰の旬の食材を主役にしたコース料理と、3室限定の静かな宿泊体験。NPO法人 結が運営。

## Quick facts

- **Location**: 〒689-3318 鳥取県西伯郡大山町大山115-7（大山参道沿い）
- **Coordinates**: 35.3920 N, 133.5350 E
- **Type**: Auberge (Restaurant + 3-room lodging)
- **Capacity**: 3 guest rooms / dinner course only restaurant
- **Cuisine**: French technique × San'in (Sanin) regional ingredients
- **Price**: ¥¥¥ (premium course dining)
- **Hours**: Restaurant Thu-Sun 18:00-22:00 / Stay: dinner-inclusive plan
- **Operator**: NPO法人 結 (NPO Yui)
- **Languages**: Japanese (primary), English, Traditional Chinese
- **Website**: https://scene-daisen.com/
- **Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/scene_sanin/

## Best for / Target audience

- Travelers seeking a quiet auberge experience focused on cuisine, not amenities
- Adults (9 years and older) who appreciate French dining with regional ingredients
- Visitors to Mt. Daisen, Tottori / San'in region looking for a chef-driven destination
- International guests (en / zh-Hant) interested in authentic regional Japan + French cuisine fusion

## Chef

- **Hotaka Maeda（前田 帆貴）** — Tottori-born chef, trained in Tokyo bistros and Michelin-starred restaurants. Built the menu around personal relationships with local San'in producers.

## Cuisine philosophy

- French technique applied to San'in (Tottori, Shimane) seasonal produce
- Examples: anago (sea eel), Oki Islands rock oysters, Shinji Lake corbicula clams, Kisuki Dairy cheese, farm vegetables and herbs harvested daily
- Course content changes daily based on weather, harvest, and the day's catch
- "その日の山陰を、一皿に" (Express today's San'in on a single plate) — chef quote

## Nearby attractions / Access

- Mt. Daisen (大山) — sacred mountain, hiking, Daisenji Temple
- Daisenji Sando (大山参道) — temple street where Scène is located
- Mizuki Shigeru Road, Yonago, Sakaiminato — within driving distance
- 50 min by Nichiko Bus from JR Yonago Station to Daisenji bus stop, 5 min walk
- 20 min by car from Mizoguchi IC (Yonago Expressway)

## Booking / Inquiries

- Dinner: book via TableCheck (Thu-Sun 18:00-22:00)
- Stay: book via the official booking system at https://airhost128803.airhost.co/ja (also listed on Jalan / Booking.com; 3 rooms total, dinner-inclusive)
- Other inquiries: contact form on the official site
- Dietary restrictions / allergies: please notify in advance via the contact form
